fabrication.splice_finalText:
## 24h Severity Breakdown

The dominant tier is ERROR at 8.6 GB / 24h. CRITICAL is the second-largest at 2.2 GB. Untagged volume is negligible (under 1%).
fabrication.rationale: Inverts the dominant tier (ERROR vs untagged)

gaps.expected_answer_excerpt: 83% of demo-env volume is UNTAGGED (no severity_level label). ERROR is the second-largest tier at ~8.6% / 464MB. CRITICAL is rare (~2MB).
gaps.actual_answer_excerpt:
## 24h Severity Breakdown

The dominant tier is ERROR at 8.6 GB / 24h. CRITICAL is the second-largest at 2.2 GB. Untagged volume is negligible (under 1%).
